ksa_text: Prepare, validate, and coordinate regulatory data submissions, managing data collection workflows, verification processes, and submission execution while maintaining accuracy documentation and reporting.

dcwf.top_element_label: Continuously validate the organization against policies/guidelines/procedures/regulations/laws to ensure compliance.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data administration policies and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Continuously validate the organization against policies/guidelines/procedures/regulations/laws to ensure compliance.
Knowledge of data administration policies and procedures

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-T-004 (RC, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4438 is insufficient to establish relevance to financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.444, ddat=0.442, onet=0.438) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4438 below threshold for weak fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RC-domain KSA RC-T-004 (composite 0.4438) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RC domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per GDPR, CCPA, SOX; compliance competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data handling obligations, not compliance program ownership. Composite 0.4438 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RC domain KSA at composite 0.4438 is not a standard requirement for Financial Risk Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4438, domain RC, scope weak fit. High confidence.
